zh.Waltham,Kent,England: 英國英格蘭肯特沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Marynes於1274年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Thomas De Marines20歲，母親Alice De Cobham17歲。她於大約1290年與William de Haute結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1364年在英國英格蘭肯特享年90歲。

zh-hans.Waltham,Kent,England: 英国英格兰肯特沃爾坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Marynes于1274年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Thomas De Marines20岁，母亲Alice De Cobham17岁。她于大约1290年与William de Haute结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1364年在英国英格兰肯特享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Erasmo, Ignacio, Luis, Ricardo, Roberto, Rosendo, Alejandro, Alicia, Amador, Ambrosio.
Catalan and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of several towns called Marines, in Valencia and Asturias (Spain).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Marynes was born in 1274, in Kent, England, her father, Thomas De Marines, was 20 and her mother, Alice De Cobham, was 17. She married William de Haute about 1290. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1364, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Marynes est née en 1274, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Marines, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice De Cobham, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William de Haute environ 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1364, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Marynes 1274 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas De Marines 20 und ihre Mutter Alice De Cobham 17. Sie hat um 1290 William de Haute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Marynes è nata il nel 1274 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas De Marines, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice De Cobham, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William de Haute circa 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1364, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Marynesが1274年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Thomas De Marinesは20歳，母Alice De Cobhamは17歳であった。約1290年にWilliam de Hauteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1364年にイギリスイギリスケントで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Marynes(이)가 1274년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas De Marines(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Cobham(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1290년 William de Haute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Waltham,Kent,England: Waltham, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Marynes nasceu em 1274, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas De Marines, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Cobham, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Haute aproximadamente 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1364, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Marynes родилась в 1274 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas De Marines было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Cobham, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Haute около 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1364 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Marynes nació en 1274, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas De Marines, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice De Cobham, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William de Haute aproximadamente 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1364, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años.
